title: Fix Left Sidebar Filters Broken After Pagination Changes
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the left sidebar filters to work correctly after pagination changes, so that I can filter reports without encountering broken behavior.
description: Bug fix: left sidebar filters on the Reports and Dashboards page stopped working after changes to the pagination system. The filter event handlers needed to be updated to work with the new pagination structure.
acceptance_criteria: All left sidebar filters function correctly
Filters work in combination with pagination
Changing a filter resets to the first page of results
ux_changes: Fixed left sidebar filter event handlers to work with the updated pagination system.
implementation_notes: Pagination changes altered the DOM structure, breaking the filter event bindings.
